title: mesosphaerum melissoides
intro: Mesosphaerum melissoides, also known as Brazilian lemon balm or Melissa officinalis var. altissima, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum melissoides include its ability to relieve anxiety, improve cognitive function, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and can also be consumed as a supplement or used topically for its skin benefits.
